segments.text: Pick one. You have three seconds.
You want more options? I can do that too with a single prompt. In fact, let me show you how I built all of this inside Imagine Art on a single canvas. So, you can create similar workflow yourself.
Just write a prompt, generate the presenter using a reference image, place the smartwatch on their hand, and turn it into a video. All right, here. And
let's say what a completely different look for a presenter. You can just swap the reference image in the master prompt and everything else in the pipeline will stay as is. The results are also top
tier because you get access to models like Nano Banana Pro, Chad GBD for images, Clink 3.0, Cance Pro, Vio3 for video. Oh, and you can share this entire
pipeline with your team in two clicks so they can also replicate your style for other projects. Super simple, right?
